findings_summary: Dashboard/API board archive/delete guard smoke passed: boards containing vFinal Factory work cannot be archived or hard-deleted, while ordinary disposable boards can still be archived or deleted.
tool_or_profile: Hermes v0.16.0 disposable installed runtime with vFinal adapter patches including candidate 0016
runtime_scope: Disposable installed Hermes checkout and isolated HERMES_HOME/HOME; direct Python calls into dashboard plugin route functions; no production dashboard server.

factory_archive_attempt.detail: Boards containing Overkill Factory cards or worker subtasks cannot be archived from dashboard/API; close the Factory work with Receipt Five or use an explicit operator-safe board r

factory_hard_delete_attempt.detail: Boards containing Overkill Factory cards or worker subtasks cannot be deleted from dashboard/API; close the Factory work with Receipt Five or use an explicit operator-safe board re

important_limitations: This proves direct dashboard plugin route functions in a disposable installed Hermes runtime after candidate patch 0016.
It does not start an authenticated HTTP dashboard server.
It does not define a future operator-approved board retirement workflow.
It does not authorize updating a real Hermes runtime.
next_action: Add patch 0016 to the update sequence and continue proving remaining dashboard/API route families.
